code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn byte_eq(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ b: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x == b
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn update_acc(_ acc: String, _ target: String) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut found = false
  let n = string.len(acc)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i
    while j < n and not byte_eq(acc, j, 9)
      j = j + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(acc, i, j)
    mut k = j + 1
    while k < n and not byte_eq(acc, k, 10)
      k = k + 1
    end
    let cnt_str = string.substring(acc, j + 1, k)
    if tok == target and not found
      let cnt = match string.parse_int(cnt_str)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      let new_cnt = cnt + 1
      result = "#{result}#{tok}\t#{new_cnt}\n"
      found = true
    else
      result = "#{result}#{tok}\t#{cnt_str}\n"
    end
    i = k + 1
  end
  if not found
    result = "#{result}#{target}\t1\n"
  end
  result
end

fn find_top(_ acc: String) -> String
  mut best_tok = ""
  mut best_cnt = 0
  let n = string.len(acc)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i
    while j < n and not byte_eq(acc, j, 9)
      j = j + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(acc, i, j)
    mut k = j + 1
    while k < n and not byte_eq(acc, k, 10)
      k = k + 1
    end
    let cnt_str = string.substring(acc, j + 1, k)
    let cnt = match string.parse_int(cnt_str)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    if cnt > best_cnt
      best_cnt = cnt
      best_tok = tok
    end
    i = k + 1
  end
  "top=#{best_tok}=#{best_cnt}"
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  mut acc = ""
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if is_ws(input, i)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws(input, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let token = string.substring(input, i, j)
      acc = update_acc(acc, token)
      i = j
    end
  end
  println(find_top(acc))
end
